title: verbascum pangaeum
intro: Verbascum pangaeum, also known as the Himalayan mullein, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Verbascum pangaeum include its ability to aid in respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Verbascum pangaeum is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
